do_not_do: Do not stage a live order from this plan.

Do not load, reload, start, stop, or edit launchd agents.
Do not lower the proof floor below 20.
Do not hide month-scale replay negatives.
Do not derive lot size from remaining_to_4x or any 4x deficit.
Do not invent an operator decision.
Do not print, copy, or persist secrets or tokens.
Do not overwrite runtime bidask rules from a candidate replay artifact without a separate reviewed code change.
Do not treat proof_queue_count=0, mathematical 4x firepower, or replay support as live permission.
